sections.heading: Newly Diagnosed Stage IA or IB Epithelial Ovarian Cancer (Fertility Not Desired)
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "newly_diagnosed_stage_ia_ib_early_stage_epithelial", "title": "Newly Diagnosed Stage IA or IB Epithelial Ovarian Cancer (Fertility Not Desired)", "branching_basis": ["stage", "histology", "grade", "residual disease", "biomarker status", "patient age and comorbidities"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Stage IA or IB, high-grade serous or endometrioid (grade 2/3) carcinoma, no residual disease after surgery.", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Hysterectomy/BSO with comprehensive staging", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Complete surgical staging including hysterectomy, bilateral salpingo-oophorectomy (BSO), omentectomy, lymph node dissection, and peritoneal biopsies.", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Systemic Therapy", "label": "Observation or adjuvant platinum-based chemotherapy", "preference": "Observation for low-risk patients; chemotherapy for high-risk features", "recommendation": "Observe for patients with stage IA grade 1 tumors. For stage IA grade 2/3 or stage IB, consider adjuvant carboplatin/paclitaxel for 3-6 cycles.", "linked_regimen_ids": ["carboplatin_paclitaxel_stage_i"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant chemotherapy may be offered for high-grade histology or stage IC disease. Observation is appropriate for stage IA grade 1 tumors."}}]}

sections.heading: Newly Diagnosed Stage II-IV Epithelial Ovarian Cancer
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "newly_diagnosed_stage_ii_iv_epithelial", "title": "Newly Diagnosed Stage II-IV Epithelial Ovarian Cancer", "branching_basis": ["surgical candidacy", "likelihood of optimal cytoreduction", "stage", "histology", "biomarker status"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Surgical candidate, optimal cytoreduction likely (fertility not desired).", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Primary cytoreductive surgery (PCS)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Hysterectomy/BSO with comprehensive staging and maximal cytoreductive effort. Goal is complete resection (R0) or optimal residual disease (<1 cm).", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Systemic Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant platinum-based chemotherapy ± bevacizumab", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Carboplatin/paclitaxel every 3 weeks for 6 cycles. Consider addition of bevacizumab (GOG-218/ICON-7 regimen) for high-risk disease.", "linked_regimen_ids": ["carboplatin_paclitaxel_stage_ii_iv", "gog218_regimen", "icon7_regimen"]}, {"type": "Maintenance Therapy", "label": "PARP inhibitor or bevacizumab maintenance", "preference": "Based on biomarkers", "recommendation": "For patients with germline/somatic BRCA1/2 mutation or HRD: olaparib, niraparib, or rucaparib. If bevacizumab used, consider olaparib+bevacizumab or niraparib+bevacizumab. If no BRCA/HRD: bevacizumab maintenance or observe.", "linked_regimen_ids": ["olaparib_maintenance", "niraparib_maintenance", "rucaparib_maintenance", "olaparib_bevacizumab_maintenance", "niraparib_bevacizumab_maintenance"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant platinum-based chemotherapy is standard. Maintenance therapy with PARP inhibitors or bevacizumab may be added based on biomarkers and prior treatment."}}, {"criteria": "Poor surgical candidate or low likelihood of optimal cytoreduction.", "options": [{"type": "Systemic Therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant chemotherapy (NACT)", "preference": "Preferred (category 1)", "recommendation": "Platinum-based chemotherapy ± bevacizumab for 3-4 cycles before reassessment for interval debulking surgery (IDS).", "linked_regimen_ids": ["carboplatin_paclitaxel_neoadjuvant", "gog218_regimen_neoadjuvant", "icon7_regimen_neoadjuvant"]}, {"type": "Surgery", "label": "Interval debulking surgery (IDS)", "preference": "Preferred after 3-4 cycles", "recommendation": "Hysterectomy/BSO with maximal cytoreduction. Consider HIPEC/cisplatin for stage III disease.", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Systemic Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant chemotherapy after IDS", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Complete a total of 6 cycles of platinum-based chemotherapy. May consider IP/IV regimen for optimally debulked patients.", "linked_regimen_ids": ["ip_iv_cisplatin_paclitaxel", "ip_iv_carboplatin_paclitaxel"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "NACT followed by IDS and adjuvant chemotherapy is an alternative to PCS. Maintenance therapy as above."}}]}

sections.heading: Recurrent Platinum-Sensitive Ovarian Cancer
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "recurrent_platinum_sensitive", "title": "Recurrent Platinum-Sensitive Ovarian Cancer", "branching_basis": ["time to recurrence", "surgical candidacy", "volume of disease", "prior therapies", "biomarker status"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Relapse ≥6 months after completing prior platinum-based chemotherapy, isolated or limited foci of disease, good performance status, no ascites.", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Secondary cytoreductive surgery", "preference": "Useful in certain circumstances", "recommendation": "Consider for patients with isolated or limited recurrent disease amenable to complete resection. May be combined with platinum-based chemotherapy."}]}]}

nodes.label: Surgical candidacy and likelihood of optimal cytoreduction
Surgical candidate, optimal cytoreduction likely (fertility not desired).
